positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a golden retriever running through a field of wildflowers at sunrise. The art style should be modern vector illustration mixed with watercolor texture, emphasizing clean, strong black lines and silhouette elements. The dog should be the main, central subject, captured mid-leap. The overall composition must be contained within a central, circular emblem design for high versatility. Use a warm color palette of burnt orange, soft gold, and lavender against a crisp white background. Focus on dynamic motion lines and joyful energy. --ar 1:1
